title: Civitas67BResearchImprovementCandidate
description: One research-only improvement candidate exported from a Civitas 6.7B failure cluster.

candidate_id.description: Stable research candidate id derived from the source cluster and bound hashes.

candidate_hash.description: SHA3-256 hash of canonical candidate content excluding this field.

source_cluster_id.description: Failure cluster id that caused this candidate record to be exported.

source_cluster_hash.description: Hash of the failure cluster that sourced the candidate.

source_split.description: Dataset split that produced the source cluster.

proposed_change_summary.description: Human-readable bounded change summary for review.

proposed_delta.description: Structured research delta. It is candidate paperwork and is not applied by export.

evidence_refs.description: Failure cluster and receipt-derived evidence references.

policy_refs.description: Policy corpus and active policy bindings for the candidate.

trust_region_hash.description: Trust-region hash declared for later gate work, or an explicit placeholder such as not_loaded.

config_hash_before.description: Configuration hash before any candidate evaluation or later gate.

generation_run_id.description: Candidate generation run id, or explicit placeholder when not loaded.

generation_condition.description: Candidate generation condition, or explicit placeholder when not loaded.

gate_boundary_context.description: Declared pre-gate research boundary for the candidate export.

claim_supporting_run.description: False for any non-train or debug-override candidate artifact.
